# 7 维评分校准模型 (validation_model)

> 数据源：**synthetic 50 samples** · 推荐主 backend：**multi_vlm**

## 1. 各 backend RMSE / MAE

| backend | RMSE | MAE | 样本数 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| multi_vlm | 0.1265 | 0.1031 | 50 |
| doubao_seed16 | 0.1745 | 0.1276 | 50 |
| mock_sha256 | 0.3236 | 0.2691 | 50 |

| style | 0.2292 |

| clarity | 0.0931 |
| color | 0.0846 |
